ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  India Power Corporation Limited (IPCL), formerly DPSC Limited, is formally under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) as per a NCLT order dated May 15, 2026. This document, sent by the Interim Resolution Professional, reports the second Committee of Creditors (CoC) meeting held on July 20, 2026, to deliberate on insolvency-related matters. The company's CIRP status is a critical red flag, indicating severe financial distress with significant adverse impacts on its operational future and shareholder equity.
